titleStmt.title: SII 6.965: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 965. (A.R. No. 311 of 1899). IN THE THIRTIETH NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śākābdērāmadhātrīnayanaśaśimitē pauṣyamāsi prasiddhē [da¨rśā]pātā¨rkavārē
śravaṇapariṇatē śaśvada¨rdhdhōdayākhyē . bhūyaḥ sva¨rbhbhānubhānugrahaṇajasamayē
tattithau sōmavārē puṇyē kāladvayēpi sthiraviśadayaśaḥ puṇyavāṁcchābhi(ḥ)vri
dhyai . 1 naraharitī¨rtthamunīṁdrassiṁhagirīṁdrasya sannidhau nṛharēḥ . vilasadakhaṁḍa
catuṣṭayadīpadyutidājyasiddhayē prādāt . 2 sā¨rdhdhaśataṁ bhastānāṁ dhēmānāṁ
viṁśatiṁccha paṁcphayutāṁ . Ācaṁdratārakā¨rkkaṁ dha¨rmmamimaṁ pāṁttu vaiṣṇavāssata
taṁ . 3 svasti śrī . śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1213 gunēṁṭṭi pauṣyamāsamuna śravaṇavyatīpātā¨rkkavārasa
hitamaina A¨rddhōdayamanu pēraṁgala Amāvāsyanāṁḍunu I divasamuna sū¨ryyagrahaṇasa
hitamaina sōmavāramunāṁḍunu I puṇyamaina kāladvayamaṁdunnu naraharitī¨rtthaśrī
pādamulu tamakunu Āyurārōgyayaśaḥpuṇyābhivṛdhdhigānu śrīsiṁhagirināthuni
divyasannidhiyaṁdu Akhaṁḍadīpālu nāluvu veluṁguṭaku peṭṭina mōdālu 25 nu(nu)
goṟiyalu nūṁṭa EṁbaI lekka goṟiyalu 150 yunu I dīpālu nāluvunu
Acaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigānu sellaṁgaladu I dha¨rmmuvu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa . śatruṇāpi kṛtō
dha¨rmmaḥ pālanīyyō manīṣibhiḥ . śatrurēva hi śatrusyāddha¨rmmaḥ śatru[¨r*]nna kasyacit . śrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 6.965 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
